metadata.description: The open brand-genesis engine — naming, identity, voice, and brand book, from Claude Code

plugins.name: brand-skills
plugins.description: 14 brand-genesis skills: metaphor-driven naming, brand context, strategy, architecture, identity, voice, story, positioning, messaging, target audience, competitor branding, guidelines (brand book), audit, and rebranding. Brand creation only — no go-to-market.
